## User Engagement Teardown: Vox

**Published by**

September 9, 2015

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/090915_User-Engagement-Teardown-Vox.png)

We published our [first User Engagement Teardown (of Jet.com)](https://blog.iterable.com/introducing-the-user-engagement-teardown/) two weeks ago and we’re now following it up with the next one: a look into how [Vox](https://vox.com) engages its readers.

Vox is a general news site, part of the [Vox Media](https://www.voxmedia.com/) group of sites, and its engagement goals are therefore very different to those of Jet. In the teardown we take a look at what they’re doing today and offer a few recommendations that could increase their readers’ engagement.

_(Note: if you can’t see the embedded SlideShare below, make sure to turn off any ad blockers!)_
